---
title: "Chapter 4 OMOP concepts (probably to go before measurement)"
teaching: 0
exercises: 0
---

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: questions 

- What

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: objectives

- 1

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Introduction


::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: keypoints 



::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

[r-markdown]: https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/
